resources.string: Ntushobora gufungura page kuko URL itemewe.
Iyi videwo ntabwo yemewe kuyirebera kuricyi gikoresho.
Ikiranga ihamagara cyemejwe. Imihamagarire ikurikira:ntabwo ifunze
Ikiranga ihamagara cyemejwe. Imihamagarire ikurikira: irafunze
geragenza guhindura umuyoboro ugezweho. Kanda kugirango uhindure.
Ntushobora kugera ku muyoboro wa telefoni
RUIM ikoresha PIN yo gufungura urubuga
Gusaba ko RUIM ifungura urubuga byananiranye.
Gufungura umuyoboro wa RUIM Hrpd mwasabye byakunze.
Icyifuzo cyo gufungura Rezo1 ya RUIM nticyakunze.
Umuyoboro wa 1 wa RUIM ufungutse neza.
Gufungura umuyoboro2 wa RUIM icyifuzo nticyemewe.
abatanga serivise za RUIM bakuramo kubadika.
Uburyo bwo gusaba gufungura bwa RUIM bwanze.
Gusaba serivise zijyanye na RUIM gufungura…
Serivise za RUIM zatanzwe mu gufungura zakunze.
Imibarebanga yo gufungura umuyoboro kuri SIMUKADI
Gufungura umuyoboro wa SIMUKADI icyifuzo nticyemewe.
Imibarebanga yo gufungura umuyoboro kuri SIMUKADI
Igice cyo Gufungura Rezo ya SIMUKADI icyifuzo nticyeme we.
Gusaba gufungura rezo iyashyizweho ya SIMUKADI…
Gufungura rezo yashyizweho ya SIMUKADI byakunze
Umuyoboro wa sisitemu ya serivise itanga yafunguye PIN.
Umuyoboro wa sisitemu ya serivisi itanga ntiyafungutse neza.
Umuyoboro wa sisitemu ya serivise itanga yafungutse neza.
servisi za SIMUKADI zifungurwa na PIN
ugufungura kwa sabwe umutanzi wa service za simukadi nti gukunze.
Gusaba serivisi ya Simukadi itanga gufungura…
Serivise za SIMUKDI zatanzwe mu gufungura zakunze.
"SP ahabanza hahwanye PLMN gufungura imibare banga "
Ubusabe bwo gufungura SP Equivalent Home PLMN bwanzwe.
SP Equivalent Home PLMN gufungura neza
Nyta serivise zijyanye no guhamagara cyangwa ubutabazi.
Nta serivisi yo gutanga amakuru kuri telefoni igendanwa
"Byakuweho by'agateganyo n'uguha serivisi zijyanye na SIMUKADI %d"
"Kugirango ugende uhinduranya ibirimo, kanda ugumisheho kuri buto y'ibikoreshwa."
"Hitamo ibyo ukoresha igihe ukanze kuri buto y'imikoreshereze:"
Hitamo ibiranga gukoresha buto yamajwi munzira ngufi
"Ese wemera %1$s kugenzura n'ububasha bwose icyo gikoresho cyawe?"
" Kugirango uhindure hagati y'ibibigize, nyereza uzamura ukoresheje intoki eshatu ugumisheho."
Hitamo ibyo wifashisha ku bimenyetso byo gukoresha (nyereza uzamura uva ku ndiba ya ekara ukoresheje intoki eshatu):
" Kugirango uhindure hagati y'ibibigize, nyereza uzamura ukoresheje intoki ebyiri ugumisheho."
Kugirango ukoreshe ibitangirwa uburenganzira, nyereza uzamura uva ku ndiba ya ekara ukoresheje intoki ebyiri.
Kanda ku buryo bwo gutangira kubukoresha:
Ishobora gukurikirana imikoranire yawe na porogaramu cyangwa ibyuma bya mudasobwa, ikanahuza na porogaramu mu izina ryawe.
Ishobora gusoma ibintu byose biri kuri sikirini no kwerekana ibikubiyemo kurundi rubuga.
Kugenzura byuzuye birakwiriye kuri porogaramu zigufasha mu byo ukeneye kugeraho, ariko si kuri porogaramu nyinshi.

"Gufata cyane byombi urufunguzo rwubwirangire amasegonda make ugacana accessibility features. Ibi bishobora guhindura imikorere yigikoresho.
Ibibigize akakanya %1$s :urashobora guhindura ibintu byatoranijwe muri Igenamiterere> Accessibility."
"Gushyiraho inzira y'inzira yoroheje yo kugera ku bikoresho by'ikoranabuhanga?"

"Gufata cyane amabuto yombi y'amajwi amasegonda make ugacana %1$s ibintu by'uburyo bwo kuboneka. Ibi bishobora guhindura imikorere yigikoresho.
Ushobora guhindura iyi nzira ngufi ukayihindurira indi mu Ingenamiterere> Kwinjira."
"Kurekura amabuto yama ijwi. Kugira ngo uyishyireho%1$s, komeza ukande kandi ugumisheho amabuto yombi z'indangururamajwi mu gihe cy'amasegonda 3."
"Mu gihe iyabugufi iri kwemera, kanda buto y'ubwirangire amasegonda 3 hanyuma ubone ibindi bishya."
Igikoresho cy indanguramajwi gifata ku mutwe
Kanda kugira ngo uhagarike kureba amakosa binyuze muri USB
"Kanda kugira ngo uhagarike gupima amakosa ku muyoboro ya internieti idakoresha umugozi "
Kuzimya ijwi kugeza igihe igikoresho gitangiriye
Nuramuka udategereje %s ngo ikoreshe ibi, kanda ufungure amagenamiterere maze uyifunge.
Nta porogaramu yabonetse yo gukemura iki gikorwa
Fungura kugira ngo umenye byinshi cyangwa uhagarike porogaramu.
Ibi ntibishobora kuboneka kuri we %1$s muri aya masaha. Gerageza kuri terefone yawe ahubwo.
Iyi porogaramu irasaba umutekano winyongera. Gerageza kuri terefone yawe ahubwo.
Ibi ntibishobora kuboneka kuri %1$syawe. Gerageza kuri terefone yawe ahubwo.
" %1$s ntibashije kuboneka none Iki kigenzurwa na %2$s."
"Urashobora guhindura ibi igihe cyose mu Magenamiterere "
Nta bitekerezo byo kuzuza mu buryo bwikora
{count, plural, =1 {Icyifuzo kimwe cyo kuzuza mu buryo bwikora} other {ibyifuzo # byo kuzuza mu buryo bwikora} }
Kubika kugirango wuzuze mu buryo bwikora
Terefoni ifite inyishyu zihagije. Ibiranga ntibikibujijwe.

"Uburyo bwo kuzigama batiri buhindura uko terefoni igaragara kandi igabanya cyangwa igahagarika ibikorwa b yimbere, na bumwe mubunga bwa amashusho, ibintu bimwe na bimwe, n'imiyoboro y'itumanaho imwe n'imwe."

"Uburyo bwo kuzigama batiri buhindura uko terefoni igaragara kandi igabanya cyangwa igahagarika ibikorwa b yimbere, na bumwe mubunga bwa amashusho, ibintu bimwe na bimwe, n'imiyoboro y'itumanaho imwe n'imwe."
"Nta mubare banga, igishushanyo cyangwa ijambo ry'ibanga ryashyizweho"
Ibikoresho byifashisha ibice bya muntu mu mutekano ntibibonetse
Burutufu izagumaho igihe urimo gukoresha uburyo bwa kadege
"{count, plural, =1 {Gufata ifoto ya raporo iri muri ekara y'ibitagenda mu isegonda #.} other {Gufata ifoto ya raporo iri muri ekara y'ibitagenda mu masegonda #.} }"

"Ibi bizakusanya amakuru ajyanye n'uburyo igikoresho cyawe gihagaze, cyoherezwa nk'ubutumwa bwa e-imeri. Bizatwara igihe gito kuva gutangira raporo y'ibibazo kugeza igihe yiteguye koherezwa; nyamuneka wihangane."

"Koresha aya mahitamo mu kugabanya kidobya muri serivisi igihe igikoresho cyawe kidakora cyangwa kigenda gake igihe ukeneye ahantu hose ha raporo. Ntikwemerera gushyiramo ibisobanuro byimbitse cyangwa gufata amafoto y'ibiri kuri ekara yiyongera."

Jya uyikoresha mu mimerere hafi ya yose. Iragufasha gukurikirana iterambere rya raporo, winjiza amakuru arambuye kubyerekeye ikibazo, no gufata amashusho. Ishobora gusiba ibice bimwe na bimwe bidakoreshwa cyane bifata igihe kirekire cyo gutanga raporo.
Kunanirwa gufata amashusho hamwe na raporo yamakosa
Ishobora gufata ibimenyetso byafashwe ni icyuma gikoresha ibikumwe.
Kugenzura uburyo bwo kwagura ikigero cya mashusho
Urashobora gukanda, guhanagura, no gukora ibindi bimenyetso.
"Harimo amakuru bwite nk'imibare y'amakarita ya banki n'amagambo y'ibanga."
Ibikoresho bizajya bivugirwa mu ijwi riranguruye kandi bigashobora gusesengurwa hifashishijwe ibimenyetso.
genzura ibikubiye mubijyanye nibyo uri gukoraho.
Kanda kugirango usohoke muri porogaramu yo gutwara imodoka.
Porogaramu yo gutwara imodoka iri gukora
Hitamo porogaramu ikoresha igikoresho cya USB.
Gukuraho ibisanzwe mu Gushyiraho Sisitemu > Porogaramu > byakuruwe kuri murandasi.
Mugaragaza mu bice bibiri ntibishobora kuboneka kuko uburyo bwo kuzigama Batiri iriho. Urashobora guhagarika ibi mu igenamiterere
ekara ebyiri ntabwoziboneka kuberako telefoni ikomeje gushyuha cyane
Imyitwarire igirwaho ingaruka. kubihagarika reba aho batangiza.
Kugenzura uburyo bwo kunyereza gukoraho & gukomeza

"Gukomeza kumvira kurugero rurihejuru?
Igipimo cyamajwi ya ekuteri cyabaye hejuru igihe kirekire, kurusha uko byasabwaga"

"Hatahuwe indanguramajwi
Ubwirangire bwa ekuteri ya terefoni bwagiye hejuru kurenza ibyasabwe, bishobora kwangiza ingoma z'amatwi."

"Kugirango ugabanye ikoreshwa ry'amakuru, Uburyo bwo kuzigama bateri ibuza porogaramu zimwe kohereza cyangwa kwakira amakuru inyuma. Porogaramu ukoresha ubu ishobora kugera ku makuru, ariko ishobora kubikora gake. Ibi bishobora gusobanura, kurugero, ko amashusho atagaragazwa kugeza igihe uyakanzeho."
"Amakuru yahagaritswe mu gihe gisigaye cy'urugendo rwawe"
Porogaramu zawe zakoresheje interineti nyinshi kurusha ubusanzwe
Imikoreshereze ya interineti yo hejuru ya terefoni
"Hejuru y'imipaka yawe ya interineti iya Wi-Fi"
Iyi porogaramu ntabwo ihuza na verisiyo nshya ya Android. Genzura ivugurura cyangwa uvugishe uwakoze porogaramu.

"Iyi porogaramu yubatswe kuri verisiyo ishaje ya Android. Ishobora kudakora neza kandi ikaba idafite ubuziranenge n'ubwisanzure bwo kurinda amakuru. Genzura ivugurura, cyangwa uvugishe uwakoze porogaramu."
Adimini yaretse igikoresho cyo gukoresha ku giti cye
fungura %s muri ecran yuzuye kugirango urebe neza

"Amakode y'ikoranabuhanga ya %1$s ibiteganywa birahari ku bwawe ngo ubisangize. Witondere: aya makode y'ikoranabuhanga ashobora kuba arimo amakuru yihariye y'umuntu ku giti cye bitiye uburengazira, bishobora kuba birimo ibintu wanditse."

Gahunda%1$s yarengeje ubushobozi bwayo bwo kubika %2$s. Ikirundo kirahari kugirango ugisangize. Witondere: iki kirundo igshobora kuba kirimo amakuru yihariye yumuntu ku giti cye bitiye uburengaziraho, bishobora kuba birimo ibintu wanditse.

"Gahunda%1$s yarengeje ubushobozi bwayo bwo kubika %2$s. Urutonde rw'ibirundo birimo kuboneka kugirango usangire n'uwabikoze. Witondere: uyu murundo ushobora kuba urimo amakuru yawe bwite iyo porogaramu ishobora kugeraho."
Kugabanya koreshwa rya baterry kugira ikoreshwa igihe kinini.
Ntibyashobotse, shyiraho uburyo bwo gufunga SIM/RUIM.

"%1$s ishaka gushoboza gushakisha wifashishije Gukoraho Mu gihe gushakisha hifashishije Gukoraho byafunguwe, ushobora kumva cyangwa ukareba ibisobanuro by'ibiri munsi y'intoki zawe cyangwa ukoreshe amarenga kugira ngo bikorane na terefoni."
Iyi mImibarebangaduka ntabwo yemerewe na admin wawe
"Tuza kandi ushake aho kwikinga hafi y'aho uri."
"Tuza kandi ushake aho kwikinga hafi y'aho uri."
"Imuka aka kanya uva mu turere two ku nkombe na hantu mu nkengero z'inzuzi ujya ahantu hizewe nko k'ubutaka burebure."
Kuramo igikoresho mbere yo kuyivanamo kugirango wirinde gutakaza ibikubiyemo
"Imikorere imwe n'imwe ishobora kudakora neza. Shyiramo ububiko bushya."
Amadarubindi yijimye yabonetse. Isura yawe igomba kuba igaragara neza.
Ntabwo ishoboye gukora imiterere yisura yawe. Ongera ugerageze.
Igikoresho gipfuka mu maso cyabonetse. Isura yawe igomba kuba igaragara neza.
Isura yawe ntigaragara. fata telefoni yawe hafi namaso
Jya ukuraho ikintu cyose gipfukirana mu maso hawe.
Reba andi makuru byihuse kuri terefoni yawe
Turagusaba ko wategereza neza icyo gikoresho cyawe.
Ndagusabye ngo wongere wandikishe isura yawe.
"Can't Kora imiterere yisura yawe. Ongera ugerageze indi nshuro."
Reba andi makuru byihuse kuri terefoni yawe
"Sukura igice cyo hejuru cya ecran yawe, harimo n'umurongo w'umukara"
Reba andi makuru byihuse kuri terefoni yawe
Iramurika cyane Gerageza gushyiraho urumuri rworoheje.
Harimo kugenda cyane Komeza cyane terefone yawe.
urashobora’t kugenzura isura. igikoresho ntikibashije kuboneka
Gufungura isura ntabwo bishyigikiwe kuri iki gikoresho
Hageragejwe inshuro nyinshi. Ongera ugerageze nyuma.
Hageragejwe inshuro nyinshi. Gufungura ukoresheje Isura ntibishoboka.
Hageragejwe inshuro nyinshi. Ahubwo injiza uburyo bwo gufungura ekara.
wagarura ibijyanye namashusho mashya. Banza uhanagure iyakera .
Ntibyashobotse gushiramo uburyo bwo gufungura Terefoni ukoreshe isura
Hari ikitagendaga neza. Ongera ugerageze indi nshuro.
Gukoresha uburyo bwogufunga ecran ukoresheje isura
Koresha isura cyangwa ijambo banga kugirango ukomeze
Koraho kugira usibe isura yawe wongereho isura yawe nanone.
Kugira ngo Ukoreshe uburyo bwo gufungura terefoni ukoresheje isura, fungura kamera mu Igenamiterere>amabanga
Ibigeragezo byinshi byo gufungura ukoresheje isura byarenze

"Porogaramu ya adimini ntishobora gukoreshwa. Igikoresho cyawe kigiye gusibwa none aha.
Niba ufite ibibazo, hamagara adimini w'ikigo cyawe."
Nta paki yabonetse itanga igikorwa cya FACTORY_TEST.(IMIMERERE YO KURUGANDA)
Igikorwa cya FACTORY_TEST gishyigikirwa gusa kubipaki byinjijwe muri / sisitemu / porogaramu.
Ikibazo cyo kujya kuri rezo cyangwa kode idakora.
"Hindura umwanya w'intoki zawe witonze buri gihe"
Igikumwe kirikugenda gahoro. Ongera ugerageze indi nshuro.
Wagerageje inshuro nyinshi. Ahubwo koresha ubundi buryo bwo gufungura sikirini.
Wagerageje inshuro nyinshi. Ahubwo koresha ubundi buryo bwo gufungura sikirini.
Gushyiraho ibimenyetso byigikumwe byarangiye Ongera ugerageze.
Hari ikitagendaga neza. Ongera ugerageze indi nshuro.
koresha igikumwe cyangwa ijambo banga kugirango ukomeze
Kanda kugirango umenye amakuru arambuye ku ikoreshwa rya batiri nirya interineti
"Urimo gukoresh iyi porogaramu hanze y'imikorere y' imyirondoro yawe."
"Urimo gukoresho iyi porogaramu mu my'imyirondoro yakazi kawe."

"Wakanze kuri bouton yumuriro — ibi mubisanzwe bizimya skirini.
Gerageza gukanda byoroheje kugirango tugenzure igikumwe cyawe."

"Wakanze kuri bouton yumuriro — ibi mubisanzwe bizimya skirini.
Gerageza kwandika byoroheje mugihe ushyiraho urutoki rwawe."
Kugira ngo urangize igenamiterere, jya uzimya ecran
Ntabwo washobora kongeramo ishusho ya porogaramu.
Serivisi yo kuvugurura igihe cya GNSS
Porogaramu imwe cyangwa nyinshi zikurikira zisaba uburenganzira bwo kwinjira kuri konti yawe, ubu no mu gihe kizaza.
Kanda kugira ngo usubire mu mukino
kumikoreshereze myiza, nuko hafungurwa umukino umwe mugihe kimwe.
Ntidushobora gushyikirana na seriveri. Ongera ugerageze nyuma.
Kwemeza ukoresheje seriveri ya proxy ntibyashobotse.
Urupapuro rurimo imiterere myinshi ya seriveri.
Hari ibyifuzo byinshi birimo gukorerwaho. Ongera ugerageze nyuma.
Gahunda yo kwemeza urubuga ntabwo ishyigikiwe.
Kururamo porogaramu %1$skugira ngo ukore SIM yawe nshya
Andika Imibarebanga ifite imibare kuva kuri 4 na 8.
Andika PUK ifite imibare 8 cyangwa irenze.

"%s
Uzi neza ko ushaka kuyobora kure yuru rupapuro?"
Gushyiraho imiterere ya mwandikisho kuri %1$s, %2$s, %3$s… Kanda kugirango uhindure.
Ibigize inyandikisho byashyizwe ku %s Kanda kugirango uhindure.
Ibigaragara ku nyandikisho%1$s%2$s%3$s Kanda kugirango uhindure.
Ibigaragara ku nyandikisho%1$s,%2$s. Kanda kugirango uhindure.
Aho gushira umubare cg ijambo ryibanga

"Washizemo nabi ishusho ryo gufungura terefoni yawe inshuro%1$d. Nyuma yo %2$d kugerageza inshuro nyinshi ariko ntibigire icyo bigeraho, uzasabwa gufungura terefoni yawe ukoresheje konti ya imeli.
Ongera ugerageze mu masegonda %3$d."

Wagerageje mu buryo butari bwo gufungura terefoni inshuro %1$d. Nyuma%2$d yo kugeregeza nabi inshuro nyinshi, terefoni yawe izasubirana amakuru ya hambere nkuko yavuye mu ruganda kandi amakuru ya nyirayo yose azavamo.
"Wagerageje mu buryo butari bwo gufungura terefoni inshuro %d. Terefoni ubu igiye gusubizwa mu buryo bw'ibanze bw'uruganda."
Ongera ushyireho kode nziza ya PUK. Iyo ugerageje kongera kuyikoresha incuro nyinshi, iyo SIM irazimira burundu.
Andika Imibarebanga ifite imibare kuva kuri 4 na 8.
code ya PUK igomba kuba imibare 8.
"Waba wibagiwe izina ryawe cyangwa ijambo ryibanga? Sura "google.com/konti/kugarura.
Kugira ngo ufungure, winjire ukoresheje konti yawe ya Google.
Izina ryakoreshejwe cyangwa ijambo ryibanga tnabwo rizwi.
Wagerageje gushiramo umubare cyangwa ijambo ryibanga inshuro nyinshi
SIMUKADI ubu yahagaritswe. Andika kode ya PUK kugira ngo ukomeze. Ku bindi bisobanuro, hamagara abashinzwe umuyoboro witumanaho.

"Wanditse nabi ijambo ryibanga inshuro zirenze %1$d.
Ongera ugerageze mu masegonda %2$d."

"Washizemo nabi ishusho ryo gufungura terefoni yawe inshuro%1$d.
Ongera ugerageze mu masegonda %2$d."

"Wanditse nabi Imibarebanga yawe inshuro zirenze%1$d.
Ongera ugerageze mu masegonda %2$d."
{ count, plural, =1 {Umunsi # wa nyuma} other {Iminsi # ya nyuma} }
Nyamuneka hamagara umuyobozi ushinzwe ikoranabuhanga kugirango umenye byinshi
Saba gufungura terefoni yawe mbere yo kubadukura
Aho gushira umubare cg ijambo ryibanga

Wagerageje mu buryo butari bwo gufungura terefoni inshuro %1$d. Nyuma%2$d yo kugeregeza nabi inshuro nyinshi, terefoni yawe izasubirana amakuru ya hambere nkuko yavuye mu ruganda kandi amakuru ya nyirayo yose azavamo.

"Washizemo nabi ishusho ryo gufungura terefoni yawe inshuro%1$d. Nyuma yo %2$d kugerageza inshuro nyinshi ariko ntibigire icyo bigeraho, uzasabwa gufungura terefoni yawe ukoresheje konti ya imeli.
Ongera ugerageze mu masegonda %3$d."
"Wagerageje mu buryo butari bwo gufungura terefoni inshuro %d. Terefoni ubu igiye gusubizwa mu buryo bw'ibanze bw'uruganda."
"Waba wibagiwe izina ryawe cyangwa ijambo ryibanga? Sura "google.com/konti/kugarura.
Kugira ngo ufungure, winjire ukoresheje konti yawe ya Google.
Izina ryakoreshejwe cyangwa ijambo ryibanga tnabwo rizwi.
Wagerageje gushiramo umubare cyangwa ijambo ryibanga inshuro nyinshi
Kanda kuri meni kugira ngo ufungure.
kanda ibikubiyemo ufungure cyangwa umagare byihutirwa.
SIMUKADI ntirimo cyangwa ntishobora gusomwa. Kongeramo SIMUKADI.
"SIMUKADI yawe yahagaritswe burundu. Hamagara ikigo gitanga serivisi z'ikoranabuhanga kugira ngo ukoreshe indi SIMUKADI."
"Reba Igitabo cy'Umukoresha cyangwa uvugane n'Ibiro Bishinzwe Abakiliya."
SIMUKADI ifunzwe na code ya PUK.
Fungura ibintu byose biranga hamwe namakuru

"Washizemo nabi ishusho ryo gufungura terefoni yawe inshuro%1$d.
Ongera ugerageze mu masegonda %2$d."

"Wanditse nabi ijambo ryibanga inshuro zirenze %1$d.
Ongera ugerageze mu masegonda %2$d."

"Wanditse nabi Imibarebanga yawe inshuro zirenze%1$d.
Ongera ugerageze mu masegonda %2$d."
"Nta bubiko buhagije bwo kubika ibintu muri sisitemu. Reba neza ko ufite 250MB y'ububiko h'ubusa hanyuma wongere utangire."
Umwanya wo kubika terefoni wuzuye. Hanagura dosiye zimwe haboneke umwanya.
Guhamagara ukoresheje porogaramu yo ku kazi?
Ikigo cyawe cyemerera gusa guhamagara ukoresheje porogaramu zakazi
Ikigo cyawe kikwemerera kwohereza mesaje ukoresheje porogaramu zakazi
Ikibazo cyo kujya kuri rezo cyangwa kode ya MMI idakora.
Ntushobora guhindura imiterere yo kohereza guhamagara kuri terefone yawe mugihe uri muburyo bwo kwitiza umunara.
Umuyoboro ugendanwa nta buryo bwo kugera kuri interineti.
Imikorerera nubudahangarwa bishobora kwangirika Tanagiza kugirango ufunge. Niba byemeye ukoresheje arm64.memtag.bootctl bishyire kuri beforehand.
"Ibikorwa byahiswemo n'ibisubizo ubu birigutangwa na amamenyesha avuguruye. Amamenyesha ya Adaptive ya Android ntagishyigikiwe."

"Amamenyesha yimbitse yasimbuye amamenyensha y'ibanze ya Andoroyide muri Andoroyide 12. Aha hagaragaza ibikorwa byatanzweho ibitekerezo n'ibisubizo, ndetse biteganya amamenyesha akugenewe.
Amamenyesha afite imbaraga ashobora kugira uburenganzira ku biri mu imenyesha, harimo amakuru bwite nk'amazina y'abantu ndetse n'ubutumwa. Ubu buryo bushobora nanone gukuraho cyangwa gusubiza amamenyesha, harimo nko gusubiza abaguhamagaye, ndetse no kugira ububasha kuri Wirogoya."
SIMUKADI ifunzwe na code ya PUK. Andika kode ya PUK kugirango uyifungure.
"Ishyirahamwe ryawe ni nyiri iki gikoresho kandi rishobora kugenzura urujya n'uruza rw'imbuga Kanda ukeneye amakuru."

Apareyi ikoresha %1$siyo %2$snta interineti ifite. Ushobora gucibwa amafaranga.

Nta porogaramu ishobora gukora iki gikorwa.

%1$s byagira ingaruka ku mirambire ya batiri. Kanda urebe porogaramu ziri gukora.
"Iri menyesha ryashyizwe mu rwego rw'igihe cyose. Kanda kugira ngo utange ibisobanuro."
iri menyesha ryashyizwe kumwanya wo hasi Kanda kugira ngo utange ibisobanuro.
iri menyesha ryashyizwe kumwanya wo hejuru Kanda kugira ngo utange ibisobanuro.
Aya makuru aza mu ituze. Kanda kugira ngo utange ibisobanuro.

kunyerera hejuru kurango wongere no kunyerera hasi kugirango ugabanye.
"Umuyoboro w'itumanaho nta buryo bwo gukoresha interineti."

Emerera porogaramu gukomeza guhamagara yatangiriye muyindi porogaramu.
iyi programu ikurura aho uherereye igihe cyaricyo cyose, kabone nubwo iyi porogramu yaba itari gukoreshwa
Iyi porogaramu ishobora kubona aho uri hafi ya serivisi ziherereye mugihe porogaramu ikoreshwa. Serivisi zaho ikoresho byawe zigomba gufungurwa kugirango porogaramu ibone icyerecyezo.
Ifasha porogaramu gutanga no gukoresha ibyemezo bya DRM. Ntishobora kuzigera ikenerwa kuri porogaramu zisanzwe.

Iyi porogaramu irashobora kubona ahantu uhereye neza muri serivisi ndebahantu mugihe porogaramu igikoreshwa. Serivisi zaho ikoresho byawe zigomba gufungurwa kugirango porogaramu ibone icyerecyezo. Ibi bishobora kongera ikoreshwa rya bateri.
Rwemerera porogaramu gukoresha serivisi ya IMS guhamagara udashyizemo uruhare.
"Rwemerera porogaramu kugera ku mabwiriza yinyongera y'ikigo gitanga ahantu. Ibyo bishobora gutuma porogaramu ihungabanya imikorere ya GPS cyangwa indi miyoboro igaragaza aho umuntu ari."
"Emerera porogaramu kumva ibitekerezo ku bijyanye n'imiterere y'umurongo Ntishobora kuzigera ikenerwa kuri porogaramu zisanzwe."
"Ifasha porogaramu kureba amakuru ajyanye no guhuza imiyoboro nk'imiyoboro iriho kandi ihujwe."
"Ifasha porogaramu kuvanaho, gusuzuma, no gusiba amamenyesha, harimo ayo yashyizwe ahagaragara n'izindi porogaramu."
"Rwemerera porogaramu kureba amakuru ajyanye n'urusobe rwa Wi-Fi, nk'uko Wi-Fi ikoreshwa n'izina ry'ibikoresho bya Wi-Fi bifhujwe."
"emerera progaramu guhitamo niba WiMAX ifunguye nad amakuru yerekeranye ni itumanaho rya WiMAX ko yahujwe. "
Emeza porogarama uburyo bwo gusoma ndetse no guhindura ahatabangama.
"Iyi porogaramu ishobora kumenya ibikorwa byawe by'umubiri."
"Rwemerera porogaramu kongeramo ubutumwa mu iposita yawe y'ijwi."
Rwemerera porogaramu gusubiza guhamagara kwa terefone yinjiye.
Iyi porogaramu ishobora gufotora ikanafata amavidewo ikoresheje kamera igihe cyose.
Emerera nyirubwite guhuza urwego rwohejuru mukwakira ubutumwa. Ntishobora kuzigera ikenerwa kuri porogaramu zisanzwe.
Emerera nyirubwite guhuza serivisi zitwara. Ntishobora kuzigera ikenerwa kuri porogaramu zisanzwe.

"emerera porugaramu ihuzwa ry'uduce rusange kuburo agace rusange kohereje ubutumwa kunko kabwakiriye. amamenyesha y'uduce rusange yakiriwe muduce tumwe aburira ibikorwa by'ubutabazi. porugaramu mbi za kwivanga mu mumikorere cg imikoreshereze y'ibikoresho igihe uburyo bwa telefone bw'ubutabazi rusange bwakiriwe."
Emerera nyirubwite guhuza kumurongo wo hejuru urwego rwihariye rutanga serivisi. Ntishobora kuzigera ikenerwa kuri porogaramu zisanzwe.
"Emerera nyirubwite guhuza kumurongo wo hejuru urwego rwihariye rutanga serivisi z'indoto. Ntishobora kuzigera ikenerwa kuri porogaramu zisanzwe."
"Emerera nyirubwite guhuza kumurongo wo hejuru kugaragara kw'amamenyesha ya serivisi yo kumva. Ntishobora kuzigera ikenerwa kuri porogaramu zisanzwe."

"emerera porogaramu kuyobora igihe n'uburyo umukoresha abona ihamagarwa muri ekara."
"Emerera porogaramu kureba amagengamiterere ya Burutufu kuri terefoni, no gukora no kwemeza amatumanaho n'ibikoresho byasangijwe."
Emerera porogaramu kugena Burutufu muri terefone, no kuvumbura no guhuza nibikoresho bya kure.
Emerera porogaramu ko yamamaza mu gikoresho kiri hafi gifite Burutufu.
Kwemerera porogaramu guhuza nibikoresho biri kuri Burutufu
Emerera porogaramu kuvumbura no guhuzwa ni ibikoresho bya Burutufubiri hafi
"Rwemerera porogaramu kugera ku makuru ya mudasobwa igenzura umubiri, nk'umuvuduko w'umutima, ubushyuhe, n'umubare w'umwuka wa ogisijeni mu maraso, mu gihe porogaramu irimo gukoreshwa."
"Rwemerera porogaramu kugera ku makuru ya mudasobwa igenzura umubiri, nk'umuvuduko w'umutima, ubushyuhe, n'umubare w'umwuka wa ogisijeni mu maraso, mu gihe porogaramu iri inyuma."
"Yemerera porogaramu kwohereza ibiganiro bya murandasi, bigumaho nyuma y'uko ibiganiro birangiye. Ikoreshwa cyanebituma terefoni igenda gahoro cyangwa hagakoreshwa umwanya munini mububiko."
Emeza porogaramu kureba ndets eno kugenzura guhamagara gukorwa kuri iki gikoresho. Ibi bikubiyemo amakuru nka nomero zo guhamagara ndetse niza leta.

Kwemerera porogaramu guhamagara terefone nta mbogamizi. Ibi bishobora kuvamo inyushyu zitagenwe no guhamagara. Menya ko ibi bitemerera porogaramu guhamagara nomero zubutabazi. Porogaramu zitera ibibazo zagutwara amafaranga muguhamagara utaitangiye uburenganzira, cyangwa guhamagara bigatuma ubutumwa bujya ahandi.
Iyi porogaramu ishobora gufotora ikanafata amavidewo ikoresheje kamera igihe porogaramu iri gukoreshwa.
Iyi porogaramu yakira ubutumwa mugihe igifata amashusho gifunguye.
Yemerera porogaramu guhindura imiterere yo guhuza kuri rezo.
Yemerera porogaramu guhindura imiterere yo kwihuza kwa rezo yasangijwe.

Emerera porogaramu kwakira paki zoherejwe mubikoresho byose kumurongo wa Wi-Fi ukoresheje aderesi nyinshi, ntabwo ari terefone yawe gusa. Ikoresha ingufu nyinshi kurusha uburyo butakoresha ikoranabuhanga.
"Ifasha porogaramu guhuza no guhagarika ku hantu ho kugera kuri Wi-Fi no guhindura imiterere y'igikoresho cy'imiyoboro ya Wi-Fi."
Emerera porogaramu guhuza terefone no guhagarika terefone kuva kumurongo wa WiMAX.

"Ifasha porogaramu gukora soketi z'umurongo no gukoresha porogaramu z'umurongo zisanzwe. Urubuga n'izindi porogaramu zitanga uburyo bwo kohereza amakuru kuri interineti, bityo ubu burenganzira ntibukenewe kohereza amakuru kuri interineti."
Rwemerera porogaramu ya mugenzi gutanga ubutumwa bwa mugenzi kubindi bikoresho.
Iyi porogaramu izamenyeshwa igihe ifoto ya ecran ifashwe mugihe porogaramu ikoreshwa.

"Ifasha porogaramu guhagarika urufunguzo hamwe n'umutekano w'ijambo ry'ibanga bifitanye isano. Kurugero, terefone ihagarika gufungura igihe yakiriye guhamagara kwa terefone yinjira, hanyuma yongera gufungura igihe guhamagara birangiye."

Yemerera porogaramu kwongera ubunini cyangwa gukuraho inkingi igaragaza ibimaze gukorwa.

Emerera porogaramu ya mugenzi wawe kureba igikoresho cya mugenzi wawe mugihe ibikoresho biri hafi cyangwa kure.

"Bituma porogaramu ibona amakuru ya serivisi yo kwishyura NFC ikunda nk'ubufasha bwanditswe n'inzira."

emerera programu kureba amapaki yose yashyizwemo
Iyi porogaramu yemerera kuba wahamagara ukoreshe iki gikoresho.
Iyi porogaramu ishobora gusoma ibyabaye byose bya kalendari bibitswe kuri terefone yawe no gusangira cyangwa kubika amakuru ya kalendari yawe.

"Rwemerera porogaramu gusoma ubutumwa bw'itumanaho bwahawe igikoresho cyawe. amamenyesha y'uduce rusange yakiriwe muduce tumwe aburira ibikorwa by'ubutabazi. porugaramu mbi za kwivanga mu mumikorere cg imikoreshereze y'ibikoresho igihe uburyo bwa telefone bw'ubutabazi rusange bwakiriwe."

"Yemerera porogaramu guoma amakuru ajyanye n'abo mugugana abitse kuri terefoni yawe. Porogaramu nanone ziragira uburenganzira kuri konti zo kuri terefoni yawe zabitse amazina. Iki gishobora kugira konti zakozwe na porogaramu mwashyizemo. Uru ruhushya rutuma porogaramu zibika amakuru yawe, kandi porogaramu mbi zishobora gusakaza amakuru yamakuru yawe utabizi."
Rwemerera porogaramu gusoma ibikorwa byo kwinjizaporogaramu. Ibi bituma ibona amakuru arambuye yerekeye ibikorwa byo kwinjizaporogaramu.
Emerera urubuga gusoma amajwi mububiko bwawe busangiwe.
"Rwemerera porogaramu gusoma dosiye y'ishusho mu bubiko usangiye."
Emerera porogaramu gusoma dosiye zivuye mububiko bwawe busangiwe.
"Rwemerera porogaramu gusoma amateka y'imikoreshereze y'urusobe ku miyoboro n'ibikoresho byihariye."
Iyi porogaramu yemerera kuba wahamagara ukoreshe ama nimero ari kuri terefoni.

"Iyi porogaramu yemerera kuba wahamagara ukoreshe iyi terefoni. Uru ruhushya rutuma porogaramu imenya umubare wa terefone n'umwirondoro w'igikoresho, niba guhamagara biriho, n'umubare wa kure wahujwe no guhamagara."
Iyi porogaramu yasomwa nubutumwa bugufi bubitse kuri terefoni.
kwemerera urubuga gusoma igenamiterere rya syn kuri konti. urugero, bishobora gutuma bantu bamenya urubuga ruri synced kuri buri konti.

Yemerera porogaramu kwitangiza ubwayo mugihe sisitemu irangije gutangira. Ibi byatwara igihe kinini gucana terefoni kugira wemerere porogaramu gukomeza gukora.

Emerera porogaramu kwimura imirimo imbere ni nyuma. Porogaramu irashobora gukora bidasabye kwinjira.
Rwemerera porogaramu gusaba uruhushya rwo kwirengagiza ikoreshwa ryiza ya batiri kuri iyo porogaramu.

emerera porogaramu kwiga uburyo ekara igoranyemo (Hejuru, biringaniye, biri hasi) bigaragaza ingano ishoboka ndetse nubwoko bwo gufunga ekara. Porogaramu irashobora gutanga ubusabe umukoresha ko bavugurura ifungwa rya ekara kurwego runaka ariko umukoresha afite uburenganzira busesuye bwo kwirengagiza ubwo busabe kand agakomeza kuyikoresha. Menya ko gufunga ekara bitabitswe muburyo bworoshye gusoma kugirango porogaramu itamenya ijambobanga nyaryo.
Ifasha porogaramu kuyobora ibisohoka ku bitangazamakuru ku bindi bikoresho byo hanze.
iyi programu ifungukiramo imbere ibi byamaramo umuriro vuba
Iyi porogaramu ishobora gutegura akazi kugira ngo kazabaho ku gihe wifuza mu gihe kizaza. Ibi kandi bivuze ko porogaramu ishobora gukora mugihe udakoresha igikoresho.
Yemerera porogaramu gusoma ibiri ku bubiko bwawe wasangije.
Yemerera porogaramu kwandika ibiri ku bubiko bwawe wasangije.
Emerera porogaramu kohereza ubutumwa bwa MMS. Ibi bishobora kuvamo ibirego bitunguranye. Porogaramu mbi ishobora kugutwara amafaranga wohereje ubutumwa utabanje kubyemeza.
"Rwemerera porogaramu gushyira alarm muri porogaramu ya alarm clock. Porogaramu zimwe na zimwe z'isaha ya alarm zishobora kudashyira mu bikorwa iyi mikorere."
Yemerera porogaramu guhindura imirongo migari ihuza ku hakorwa muri ekara. Ntishobora kuzigera ikenerwa kuri porogaramu zisanzwe.

Iyi porogaramu ishobora kugaragara hejuru yizindi porogaramu kurindi ekara. Ibi bishobora kwitambika ikoreshwa rya porogaramu zisanzwe bigahindura nuko izindi porogaramu zigaragara.

Iyi porogaramu yabigenewe cyangwa ya sisitemu ishobora gufotora ikanafata amavidewo ikoresheje kamera ya sisitemu igihe icyo aricyo cyose. Bisaba uruhushya rwa android.permission.CAMERA kugira ngo na porogaramu ibe ifite

"Iyi porogaramu irashobora kongera, gukuraho, cyangwa guhindura ibyabaye kuri kalendari kuri terefoni yawe. Iyi porogaramu irashobora kohereza ubutumwa bushobora kugaragara ko buva kuri ba nyir'ikirangaminsi, cyangwa guhindura ibyabaye utabimenyesheje ba nyirabyo."
Emerera porogaramu guhindura dosiye zo guhamagara , harimo amakuru yerekeye guhamagara kwinjira no gusohoka. Porogaramu mbi irashobora gukoresha ibi kugirango uhanagure cyangwa uhindure logi yawe.
"emerera porogaramu guhinduraa amakuru y'imyirondoro abitse ku terefone yawe. ururuhushya rwemerera urubuga gusiba numero."

ingano yubushobozi bwogukoresha amakuru ari kugikoresho
gera ku hantu hateganyijwe kuri ekara imbere gusa
gera ku hantu hihariye kuri ekara imbere gusa
kwinjizwa muri serivisi za IMS call
Guhuza nibijyanye na serivise zubutumwa bugufi.
amamaza muri gikoresha kiri hafi gifite Burutufu.
"kubasha kugera kumakuru ya sensa zumubiri, nk'ibipimo by' umutima, iyo biri gukoreshwa"
"kubasha kugera kumakuru ya sensa zumubiri, nk'ibipimo by' umutima, bikorewe inyuma"
reba no kugenzura guhamagara ukoresheje sisitemu.
hita ko uhamagara kuri nimero za terefone
Emerera porogaramu cyangwa serivisi kwakira guhamagarwa binjyanye nibikoresho bya amashusho bifunguye cyangwa bifunze.
Uburenganzira bwo gucunga amasaha mu mwirondoro wa Companion Watch
Itanga uburyo bwo guhamagara bumeze neza
tahura amashusho yafashwe na porogaramu za Windows
Tangiza serivise yibanze hamwe nubwoko \"ibikoresho byahujwe\"
kora kuri serivisi zirahabanje wandike dataSync.
koresha serivisi yo kuri ekara imbere ukoresheje uburyo bwa \"fileManagement\"
kora kuri serivisi zirahabanje wandike ahantu.
"tangiza serivisi y'ahabanza iri mu bwoko bwa \"mediaPlayback\""
koresha servisisi za foreground nu ubwoko bwitwa \"microphone\"
koresha serivisi yo kuri ekara imbere ukoresheje uburyo bwa \"remoteMessaging\"
kora serivise yibanze hamwe nubwoko \"budasanzwe Gukoresha\"
guhisha ayandi ma porogaramu yashyizwe hejuru
kubona amakuru ya sensor ku gipimo ngenderwaho cyo hejuru
hamagra porogaramu ishizwe guhindura carrier provided
kunyuza uburyo bwo guhamagara binyuze muri sisitemu
Amahitamo ya serivisi za NFC Payment
soma amadosiye ya zavidewo ari mububiko bwatanzwe
Soma ikigero cya terefone yawe hamwe indangakintu.
soma imashusho yahiswemo numukoresha na videwo bivuye mububiko busangiwe
andikisha kwihuza kwa SIMUKADI nshya ya telecom
hindura cyangwa usibe ibikubiye mububiko bwawe busangiwe
Iyi porogaramu ishobora kugaragara hejuru yizindi porogaramu
Kwemerera porogaramu cyangwa serivisi kugera kuri kamera ya sisitemu yo gufata amafoto na videwo
gukora/kwakira uburyo bwo guhamagara bwa SIP
"Kugena imyanya hagati y'ibikoresho by'umuyoboro wo hejuru biri hafi"
ongera cg uhindure ibikorwa mukirangaminsi kand wohereze emayili ku bashyitsi nyirubwite atabimenyeshejwe
guhinduranya no guhagarika ubuyro bwo guhuza amakuru
"Porogaramu z'umuntu ku giti cye zizahagarikwa %1$s at %2$s. Umuyobozi wa IT ntabwo yemerera umwirondoro wawe wakazi guhagarara umwe %3$d."
Porogaramu zijyanye nibikuranga zahagaritswe kugenza ufunguye ibijyanye nakazi kawe.
Kwirinda gukoresha bimwe mubikorwa byo gufunga ecran.
"bisaba ko amakuru y'urubuga aba abitse muburyo bwibanga."
"Hindura mu buryo bwinshi uko ekara yifunga mu buryo bw' ijambobanga,imibarebanga, cyangwa ukuntu imirongobanga yahindurwa."
Gebzura nigute ndetse niryari ekara yifunga.
Igenzura uburebure ninyuguti zemewe muri sikirini zifunga ijambo banga na imibare banga.
"Gushyira igikoresho cya proxy rusange gikoreshwa mugihe politiki yemerewe. Nyir'igikoresho wenyine niwe ushobora gushyiraho proxy rusange."
Kurikirana inshuro umubare wibanga wandinditswe nabi. mugihe ufunguye ekara, hanyuma ufunge terefone cyangwa uhanagure amakuru ya terefone yose niba wanditse ijambo ryibanga nabi inshuro nyinshi.

"Kurikirana inshuro umubare wibanga wandinditswe nabi mugihe ufunguye ekara, hanyuma ufunge terefone cyangwa uhanagure amakuru yose y'uyu ukoyikoresha niba wanditse ijambo ryibanga nabi inshuro nyinshi."
Siba burundu amakuru ya terefone utaburiwe uhisemo gukora reset yuruganda.
"Kuraho amakuru y'uy'umukoresha kuri iyi terefoni nta nteguza."
Kureka imikorere imwe yo gufunga ecran
Gushyiraho igihe ntarengwa cyo gufunga ecran
shyira igikoresho cyawe kuri Proxy mpuzamahanga
Seriveri ya DNS yihariye ntishobora kuboneka
Imikorere imwe ishobora kuba idafite ubushobozi
Nta porogaramu yabonetse yo kureba iyi nimero.
{ rating, plural, =1 {inyeri imwe hanze {max}} other {# inyenyeri hanze {max}} }
"Urashaka kongera gutangira mu buryo bw'umutekano? Ibi bizakurahoporogaramu zose z'ubukemurampaka washyizemo. Bizagaruka nukora reboot nanone."
"Ibi bikubiyemo ntibishobora gufungurwa na porogaramu z'umuntu ku giti cye"
ibirimo birashoboka’t kufungurwa kubwigukora kwa porogaramu
"Ibi bikubiyemo ntibishobora gusangizwa na porogaramu z'umuntu ku giti cye"
"Ibi bikubiyemo ntibishobora gusaranganywa na porogaramu z'akazi"
Rema kubadika kuzajya kwifashisha mukubuza ihindurwa.
PIN ni ngufi cyane. Bigomba kuba bifite imibare 4 nibura.
Guhera muri Android 13, porogaramu ushyiraho zikeneye uburenganzira bwawe bwo kohereza imenyesha. Kanda kugirango uhindure ubu burenganzira kuri porogaramu zihari.
Uburyo bwo kwitiza umunara - Gukora serivisi zituzuye neza
Uburyo bwo kwitiza umunara - Sisitemu Ishimwa
Uburyo bwo kwitiza umunara - Gukora serivisi yuzuye

"Ni gute wazamura ingano y'ijwi ukarenza urugero rwasabwe?
Gutega amatwi mu ijwi riranguruye igihe kirekire bishobora kwangiza amatwi yawe."
Ongera wemeze ibi muri sisitemu igenamigambi > Porogaramu > byakuruwe kuri murandasi.
serivisi za amamenyesha ya za sensa
Ku bijyanye na porogaramu na serivisi%s
Umuyobozi wawe yasabye raporo yimbitse kugirango agufashe gukemura ikibazo cyiki gikoresho. Porogaramu namakuru bishobora gusaranganywa.
Couldn’t kugarura inzira ngufi kubera urubuga rudashobora’t kwakira kubika and kugarura
Ntibyashobotse kugarura umuyoboro mugufi kubera ko umukono wa porogaramu utabereye
"Verisiyo ya porogaramu yagabanyijwe, cyangwa ntabwo ihuza n'iyi nzira y'ubusamo"
Igumishe kuri ekara mugihe clavier igikora
Ongera ufungure igikoresho cyawe kugira ngo ugere ku murongo wa telefoni.
Umuyoboro wa telefoni uzajya uhagarikwa kugeza igihe uzatangirira gukoresha SIM yemewe.
%1$syoherereza ubutumwa bugufi bwinshi. Urashaka kwemerera iyi porogaramu gukomeza kohereza ubutumwa?
iyi izatera ibarirwa kuri konti yawe ya terefoni.
iyi yatera ibarirwa kuri conte yawe telefone.
Urashobora guhindura ibi nyuma mu Gushyiraho > Apps
"Gahunda%1$s yarenze ku mahame y'imikorere ya StrictMode yiyemeje."
{count, plural, =1 {Ububasha bwa seritifika bwinjijwemo} other {Ububasha bwa za seritifika bwashyizwemo} }
Isaba rya SS ryahindutsemo guhamagara bisanzwe
"ubusabe bwa SS bwahindutse guhamagara kuri Amashusho "
Hakozwe Impinduka ku busabe bushya bwa SS
ubusabe bwa SS bwahinduwemo ubusabe bwa USSD
Isaba rya SS ryahindutsemo guhamagara bisanzwe
"ubusabe bwa USSD bwahindutse guhamagara kuri Amashusho "
ubusabe bwa SS bwahinduwemo ubusabe bwa USSD
Hakozwe Impinduka ku busabe bushya bwa USSD
Hariho ibintu bya %1$d byasibwe kuri%2$s konti %3$s. Ni iki wifuza gukora?
Hano hari ikibazo cyimbere mugikoresho cyawe. Menyesha uwagukoreye kugirango ubone ibisobanuro birambuye.
"Hari ikibazo cy'imbere mu gikoresho cyawe, kandi gishobora kuba kidashikamye kugeza igihe uzagarukira ku makuru y'uruganda."
Uburyo bwo kugerageza imiterere yo gukomera
"Hindura uburyo bw'isaha muburyo bwo kwinjiza igihe."
Hindura uburyo bwo kwinjiza inyandiko muburyo bwo kwinjiza igihe.
Kanda inshuro ebyiri kugirango wagure imikorere
%1$syakozwe kuri verisiyo idahuje na sisitemu ya Android kandi ishobora kwitwara mu buryo butari bwitezwe. Hari igihe ushobora kubona porogaramu yavuguruwe.
"%1$sntishyigikiwe n'igishushanyo mbonera cy'ubunini bwa mugaragaza kandi gishobora kwitwara mu buryo butari bwitezwe."
"Umwanya wa USB gihagarikwa mu buryo bw'ikoranabuhanga. Kanda umenye ibyimbitse."
Amazi cyangwa imyanda mu mwenge wa USB.
"Telefoni ntiyongera kubona ibintu by'amazi cyangwa ibisigazwa."
Iyi porogaramu ntabwo yahawe uburenganzira bwo gufata amajwi ariko ishobora gufata amajwi ukoresheje iki gikoresho cya USB.
Uburyo bwo gukoresha USB bwa funguwe
Igikoresho gisharija cyahujwe Kozaho kugirango urebe andi mahitamo
Igikoresho gisharija cyahujwe binyuze muri USB
"Agakoresho k'amajwi kacometsweho ntikajyanye n'iyi terefoni. Kanda umenye ibyimbitse."
Igikoresho cyahujwe nka kamera ya mudasobwa
Kwemerera%1$s gukora Umukoresha mushya kuri %2$s(Umukoresha ufite iyi konti yamazegukorwa)?
Ntushobora kugera kuri kamera ya terefone ukoresheje%1$s
Ntushobora kureba ishusho-mu-ishusho mugihe utanga amashusho
Ibi ntibishobora kuboneka mugihe haribyo uri kureba. Gerageza kuri terefone yawe ahubwo.
%sushobora kureba no kugenzura ekara yawe. Kanda kugirango urebe
Amajwi kuri burutufu mugihe cyo guhamagara
Hindura umuyoboro cyangwa ibijyanye na VPN.
Sindikubasha kwihusa na VPN ihora icanye

"Ipaji ntabwo irimo igaragaza ibiriho.
Urashaka kuyifunga?"
Guhamagara ukoresheje umurongo wa telefoni igendanwa
%1$sUmuyoboro ugendanwa nta buryo bwo kugera kuri interineti
Gushyiraho uburyo bwo kwerekana umuyoboro udakoresheje umugozi
Umwirondoro wawe wakazi ntukiboneka kuriki gikoresho
Porogaramu yumwirondoro wakazi admin yabuze cyangwa yangiritse. Nkigisubizo, umwirondoro wawe wakazi hamwe namakuru ajyanye nabyo byasibwe. Menyesha umuyobozi wawe kugirango agufashe.
Wahagaritse porogaramu zakazi. Ntuzakira telefone iguhamagara cyangwa ubutumwa bugufi.
